About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker-Long LINC dominates today's ranking at #1 with an exceptional score of 95.0, driven by extraordinary long-term returns of 2,314.63% over 10 years and 651.14% over 5 years, significantly outpacing SPY by 2,059.15% and 573.26% respectively over those same periods. The stock shows consistent acceleration across intermediate timeframes (21.15% in 1m to 87% in 3m to 177.93% in 6m) with all four moving average filters passing, a clean momentum signal of 0.88, and a strong_buy flag, though its 1y-to-6m ratio of 0.82 suggests some deceleration in very recent momentum. CVE ranks second with a more moderate profile: 128.29% 1-year return and 280.29% over 5 years, but notably underperforms on the 10-year horizon with only 89.28% returns and a concerning -166.21% underperformance versus SPY, indicating this is a near-term cyclical play rather than a secular trend winner.
